form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start 2nd of 8 at Marseille Vivaux on March 22 over 2000m, 0.8 len behind Aleksandrovka carrying 58.5kg at $3.40. Before that 4th of 7 at Chantilly All Weather on February 5 over 1900m, 3 len behind Paddington with 57.5kg at $4.20. Well placed to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(7.5). Racing well recently. Last start 2nd of 8 at Marseille Vivaux on March 22 over 2000m, 0.8 len behind Aleksandrovka carrying 58.5kg at $3.40. Before that 4th of 7 at Chantilly All Weather on February 5 over 1900m, 3 len behind Paddington with 57.5kg at $4.20. Well placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming sat on the speed throughout before fading second last of 9 at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather on February 21 over 2000m, 7 len behind Hatanka Fal with 57kg at $7.30. Second-up ran last of 7 at Marseille-Borely on March 18 over 1800m, on a slow track; 38 len behind Cosmic Boy with 57kg at $19. Strips a lot fitter and should race forward and prove tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Third-up today. Resuming sat on the speed throughout before fading second last of 9 at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather on February 21 over 2000m, 7 len behind Hatanka Fal with 57kg at $7.30. Second-up ran last of 7 at Marseille-Borely on March 18 over 1800m, on a slow track; 38 len behind Cosmic Boy with 57kg at $19. Strips a lot fitter and should race forward and prove tough to beat.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 60 days. Resuming 7th of 9 at Deauville All Weather on January 23 over 1500m, 7 len behind Falou Chope carrying 54.5kg at $41. Second-up won by 0.8 len at Chantilly All Weather February 12 over 1900m defeating Bay House with 55kg at $31. May well be worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8). Third-up today. Not raced for 60 days. Second-up won by 0.8 len at Chantilly All Weather February 12 over 1900m defeating Bay House with 55kg at $31. May well be worth following up.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. When well in the market at debut, ran last of 7 at Toulouse on March 1 over 1600m, 6 len behind Glow Up carrying 58kg at $4.90. Last start 5th of 9 at Chantilly All Weather on March 30 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Limpide with 57.5kg at $9.80. Heading the right way and looks ready to win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Raced twice to date. When well in the market at debut, ran last of 7 at Toulouse on March 1 over 1600m, 6 len behind Glow Up carrying 58kg at $4.90. Last start 5th of 9 at Chantilly All Weather on March 30 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Limpide with 57.5kg at $9.80. Heading the right way and looks ready to win.

form.formComment: Returns from a 45-day let-up. At the latest run 7th of 11 at Chantilly All Weather on February 27 over 1300m, 3 len behind El Jeque with 57.5kg at $3.60. The start before that 3rd of 9 at Deauville All Weather on January 23 over 1500m, 1.2 len behind Falou Chope with 61kg at $3.10. Well placed. Hard to beat on his best form.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when 4th of 7 at Lyon-la-Soie on November 8 over 1800m, 6 len behind Modele Absolu carrying 55.5kg at $19. Likely improver.

form.formComment: Last start 7th of 9 at Cavaillon on March 29 over 1600m, 7 len behind Lightiana with 56.5kg. The race before that 7th of 9 at Marseille Vivaux on March 9 over 1500m, 6 len behind Senatrice with 56.5kg at $102. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Not seen since she finished last of 13 at Chantilly All Weather November 21 over 1500m, 13 len behind Misty City carrying 56.5kg at $54. On debut ninth of 13 at Compiegne June 21 over 1400m, 15 len behind Ceramic carrying 57kg at $51. Not seeing any improvement this time.
